basic_details.job_title: SEBI Part Time Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Securities and Exchange Board of India
basic_details.short_information: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) Part-time Counsellor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.sebi.gov.in. A total vacancies have been announced through the SEBI Part-time Counsellor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: There is no specific age limit mentioned for the Part-time Counsellor position in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology, Two years post qualification experience in Clinical Psychology
qualification.details: Part-time Counsellor: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology and have at least two years of post-qualification experience in the field of Clinical Psychology.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SEBI Part-time Counsellor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SEBI Part-time Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the SEBI Part-time Counsellor recruitment is 11 May 2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to ensure they reach the destination before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Part-time Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Part-time Counsellor position at the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) for the current recruitment cycle.

faq.question: Q3. What is the monthly salary for the SEBI Part-time Counsellor?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Part-time Counsellor position will receive a monthly remuneration of ₹75,000/-. This is a fixed monthly salary provided for the part-time engagement as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the SEBI Part-time Counsellor recruitment is strictly offline. Interested candidates must download the application form, fill it out, and send it via post to the address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required educational qualification for this job?
faq.answer: Applicants must hold a Post Graduate Degree in Clinical Psychology. Additionally, candidates are required to have at least two years of post-qualification experience in the field of Clinical Psychology to be considered eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the SEBI recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for the SEBI Part-time Counsellor recruitment. The application process is free of cost for all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the job location for the SEBI Part-time Counsellor?
faq.answer: The job location for the Part-time Counsellor position is in Mumbai, Maharashtra (Pincode: 400051). Candidates should be prepared to work at the specified SEBI office location in Mumbai.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Part-time Counsellor position. While it is a government organization, the nature of the engagement is part-time, and candidates should refer to the official notification for specific terms and conditions regarding the tenure.

faq.question: Q9. How will the selection process be conducted?
faq.answer: The selection process details have not been explicitly detailed in the provided data. Candidates are encouraged to check the official notification PDF for information regarding interviews or document verification processes that may be conducted by SEBI.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply online for this position?
faq.answer: No, online applications are not accepted for this recruitment. The notification specifies that the application process is offline, and candidates must submit their hard copy applications through the postal service as instructed.
